Name: Percentage of total case time spent in the phase between 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Minimum time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Total time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to the final 'SW-EIC Reject' in variants where it is the final decision

Name: Time to 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' since the 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' Cycle Time (from its enabling to its completion)

Name: Average time for 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to be done (from its start to its completion timestamp)

Name: Average time between 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and the next 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Average time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'RW-Initial Reviewer Selection' in two-round review variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week and activity RW-Initial Reviewer Selection for cases where activity RW-Initial Reviewer Selection occurs

Name: Average time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' when no reminder occurs before agreement

Name: Average time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'RW-Initial Reviewer Selection'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'RW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Total time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days' across all cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 3 days'

Name: Average time from 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' to 'SW-EIC Major Revision'
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week' and activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision'
